title: Bearing with One Another in Love
excerpt: Paul's call to unity in Ephesians 4 is not a passive suggestion — it is a joyful command that reshapes how we do community.

title: Prayer That Moves Mountains
excerpt: Jesus made an extraordinary promise about prayer. This Sunday we take it seriously — and learn what praying with faith actually looks like.

title: The Great Commission — Our Mission
excerpt: Matthew 28 is not an optional add-on to the Christian life. It is the marching order for every believer, including us here in Thika.
